calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Of Defendant San Francisco Housing Authoritys
Off Calendar Oct-07-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. The first claim submitted by plaintiff triggered the statute of limitations. Norwood is limited to a narrow factual situation and is not applicable to this case. (Sofranek v. Merced County (2007) 146 Cal. App. 4th 1238, 1248-49). Even accepting the facts as claimed by plaintiff, there is no basis to equitably estop the Housing Authority from asserting the statute of limitations. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/HEK)
